sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 69:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 69:1
items.html: Because those tastes, meaning the Gadlut that came out in the world of Nekudim was not kept there. Only afterwards, the new MA came and corrected them, and then they existed. This is why the tastes are named after the new MA. (Inner Light, Item 1)
